main.description: Adapters that cite a verification record via `verification.uri`. Reference case for the expression predicate form.

output.description: Paged<EnvelopedEntry<R>> — identical shape to the REST endpoint for this query.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a prior page of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return in one page.

description: XRPC facade for the `adapters_with_verification` catalog query. Mirrors the REST endpoint at `/v1/adapters/with-verification`; both paths invoke the same handler.
